headline: AI for Food Science: Quality Control, Flavor Prediction, and Personalized Nutrition
description: AI is entering the food system at every stage -- from accelerating discovery of new sustainable ingredients and predicting flavor profiles, to automating quality inspection on production lines, to personalizing nutrition recommendations based on individual microbiomes and health data.

citation.name: AI for food: accelerating and democratizing discovery and development
Artificial intelligence and food flavor: How AI is shaping the future of taste
